use_cases: Submit forms with styled submit buttons
Trigger actions like delete or confirm with destructive variants
Create navigation links styled as buttons
Build icon-only buttons for toolbars and actions
Add secondary or ghost buttons for less prominent actions
ai_summary: A shadcn/ui Button component with class-variance-authority for managing multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Uses Radix UI's Slot primitive for composition patterns. Standard interactive button with focus-visible states, disabled states, and hover transitions included.
